title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 26-A.  DAIRY INDUSTRY PROMOTION LAW

§4151.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the "Dairy Industry Promotion Law".

Added by Acts 1983, No. 526, §1, eff. July 8, 1983; Acts 2009, No. 24, §8L, eff. June 12, 2009.
